_meta.source: The Indigo Book 2.0 (CC0), Tables T1 (Federal Materials) and T3 (U.S. States and Other Jurisdictions)
_meta.note: Seed set for Phase 0. `canonical` is the correct abbreviation; `variants` are common spelled-out or malformed forms. Extended 2026-07-18 by direct extraction from The Indigo Book 2.0 tables T1/T3 (CC0); existing entries and their variants preserved. Federal district courts generated 2026-07-18 from the T3-derived state abbreviations x standard district prefixes (D./N.D./S.D./E.D./W.D./M.D./C.D.), after real briefs exposed spurious DATE_COURT flags.
